data.title: Trump: Stock market will rise driven by positive economic news.
data.description: US President Trump stated that he will boost the stock market with positive economic news and will announce some great figures. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump: Congress is working on regulations for the crypto market and hopes to sign a cryptocurrency bill soon.
data.description: Trump stated that the US Congress is working on regulations for the cryptocurrency market and hopes to sign a cryptocurrency bill soon. (Jinshi)

data.title: Jensen Huang discusses three major breakthroughs in AI models over the past year: open-source models, physical AI, and agent-based AI.
data.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang discussed three major breakthroughs in AI models over the past year at the Davos Forum. “Three major things happened at the AI ​​model level last year. First, when these models first appeared, there were many illusions, but last year, these models could be applied to research, reasoning, planning, and answering questions without prior training in the relevant fields—this led to Agentic AI,” Huang said. He added that the second major breakthrough came from open-source models. The launch of DeepSeek, the first open-source inference model, was a significant event for most industries and companies. Since then, the open-source inference model ecosystem has flourished, with many companies, research institutions, and educators utilizing open-source models for various purposes. Huang stated that the third area of ​​significant progress was in physics AI. Physics AI can not only understand language but also the physical world, such as understanding biological proteins, chemistry, and physics. In the field of physics, AI can understand fluid dynamics, particle physics, and quantum physics. (Yicai) (Jinshi Data APP)

data.title: BNY Mellon CEO: Undermining the Fed's foundation is not conducive to pushing for interest rate cuts
data.description: The CEO of Bank of New York Mellon stated that undermining the Federal Reserve's foundation would hinder efforts to cut interest rates. US President Trump previously stated that Federal Reserve Chairman Powell's rate hikes were preventing the Fed from achieving its goals. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Opens with Broad Gains; Crypto Stocks Rise
data.description:
On January 21, the U.S. stock market opened with widespread gains. According to BlockBeats, the Dow Jones Industrial Average increased by 0.12%, the S&P 500 rose by 0.2%, and the Nasdaq Composite gained 0.25%.

In the cryptocurrency sector, most stocks saw an upward trend. Strategy shares opened with a 1.07% increase, BitMine shares rose by 0.3%, COIN shares climbed by 0.94%, and CRCL shares advanced by 0.96%.

data.title: Trump Criticizes Federal Reserve Chair Powell's Timing on Interest Rates
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed criticism towards Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, stating that Powell has been too slow in addressing interest rate issues. According to ChainCatcher, Trump's comments highlight ongoing tensions between the White House and the Federal Reserve regarding monetary policy decisions.

data.title: 21Shares Introduces Stacks ETP for Institutional Investors
data.description: 21Shares has unveiled a new exchange-traded product (ETP) focused on Stacks (STX), providing investors with an opportunity to engage with the cryptocurrency without the need to manage blockchain infrastructure. According to NS3.AI, the ETP, named ASTX, is designed to automatically reinvest staking rewards, thereby increasing the potential for yield accumulation. This offering is particularly aimed at institutional investors and brokerage account holders who seek convenient access to STX and its associated staking benefits.

data.title: Ethereum's Price Decline Sparks Concerns Over Future Outlook
data.description: Ethereum has recently dropped below the $3,000 threshold, reflecting ongoing market weakness and macroeconomic uncertainties. According to NS3.AI, this decline has prompted discussions about Ethereum's short-term prospects. Experts in the industry emphasize that Ethereum's potential to reach $5,000 in the long term is contingent upon addressing fundamental economic sustainability issues and maintaining its status as the premier institutional settlement layer. Despite its vulnerability to short-term market corrections and volatility, Ethereum's robust institutional appeal, grounded in security and settlement reliability, positions it for possible future outperformance compared to Bitcoin.

data.title: Trump Attributes Stock Market Decline to Greenland Issue
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the recent stock market decline was due to issues related to Greenland. According to Odaily, he downplayed the significance of the market drop, expressing confidence that the stock market will eventually double.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed AVAX One launches Avalanche blockchain public validator nodes
data.description: Nasdaq-listed AVAX One announced the launch of public validator nodes on the Avalanche blockchain to support the Avalanche consensus mechanism and provide staking services for delegators. The AVAX One validator will reportedly support public delegation and utilize institutional-grade cloud architecture to support high availability and high performance. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Streamex plans to partner with tZERO to launch secondary market trading of tokenized gold securities.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Streamex announced a partnership with tZERO Group to integrate its upcoming gold-linked tokenized security, GLDY, into tZERO's Alternative Trading System (ATS), regulated by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and FINRA. This partnership will support compliant secondary market trading, helping institutional investors and ETFs holding the asset manage subscriptions and redemptions, while also supporting continuous and transparent price discovery and market activity. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Trump: The stock market decline is negligible; the stock market will double.
data.description: US President Trump stated that yesterday's stock market decline was due to Greenland, and that the decline was insignificant; the stock market would double. (Jinshi)

data.title: Macron Calls for Stronger Ties with BRICS at World Economic Forum
data.description: French President Emmanuel Macron has called on European nations to enhance their cooperation with developing countries, particularly the BRICS alliance, during the 2026 World Economic Forum. According to NS3.AI, Macron stressed the importance of multilateralism as a means to counteract U.S. tariffs and economic fragmentation. He underscored the G7's objective to establish frameworks that address global imbalances by collaborating with emerging economies.

data.title: Spot gold fell by about $40 in the short term, last trading at $4845.07 per ounce.
data.description: Spot gold fell by about $40 in the short term, last trading at $4845.07 per ounce. This followed Trump's statement that he would not use force to seize Greenland. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump's Davos speech: He praised his own economic policies and claimed that the inflation problem has been solved.
data.description: In a speech in Davos on Wednesday, US President Donald Trump claimed that his policies ushered in an era of economic prosperity for the United States and that his governing platform provides a model for Europe to emulate. Trump stated, "Yesterday marked my one-year anniversary in office, and now, 12 months after returning to the White House, our economy is booming. The economy is growing rapidly, productivity is increasing dramatically, investment is growing significantly, and incomes are rising steadily. Inflation has been resolved." At the same time, he used his speech to issue a stern warning to Europe, pointing out that liberal governments on the continent have fallen behind the United States, and that world leaders need to emulate his model to provide security for their people. Trump stated, "The United States is the engine of the global economy. When the American economy prospers, the whole world prospers; and when the American economy has problems, the whole world suffers. That's the law of history. I like Europe and want to see it prosper, but it's not on the right track." (Jin Shi)

data.title: Guernsey authorities have approved the forfeiture of $11.4 million linked to the OneCoin scam.
data.description: Authorities in Guernsey, a British Crown Dependency, have approved the forfeiture of $11.4 million (£9 million) in assets related to the OneCoin fraud case, at the request of authorities in Bielefeld, Germany, under their Proceeds of Crime Act. The funds were held in an account at RBS International Bank in Guernsey. This forfeiture represents only approximately 0.2% of OneCoin's total losses, highlighting the significant challenges in fully recovering assets in cryptocurrency fraud cases. (Decrypt)

data.title: ETHGas Foundation: GWEI token is now listed; airdropped tokens will be automatically staked for 30 days.
data.description: The ETHGas Foundation announced on the X platform that the GWEI token has been listed. Furthermore, the airdropped tokens are now available for viewing and will be automatically staked for 30 days.

data.title: Guernsey Seizes $11.4 Million Linked to OneCoin Scam
data.description: Guernsey authorities have seized $11.4 million in assets associated with OneCoin, a significant cryptocurrency scam. According to NS3.AI, this action follows a court ruling based on updated overseas forfeiture laws from 2024, targeting funds in an offshore account. Despite this recovery, most of the lost funds remain unrecovered due to the complexities involved in tracing illicit crypto assets and the use of privacy-enhancing techniques by fraudsters.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 880 USDT with a Narrowed 3.12% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 21, 2026, 14:14 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 880 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 880.570007 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 3.12% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: VerifiedX, a Bitcoin-based blockchain, launches Butterfly, a payment app that is described as a "cryptocurrency version of Venmo".
data.description: VerifiedX, a Layer-1 blockchain and Bitcoin sidechain, launched Butterfly on Wednesday. This payment application aims to be as easy to use as utilities like Venmo or Cash App, while simplifying the complexities of many popular crypto wallets and payment methods, and avoiding the relatively high fees of some exchanges. (CoinDesk)
